step_rationale: Anti-inflammatory IL-1 family member; suppresses plaque inflammation and negatively correlates with MI.
mechanism: IL-35 exerts anti-inflammatory suppression within atherosclerotic plaques, protecting against destabilization and thrombosis.

references.title: Cytokines and their role in cardiovascular diseases.
Interleukin-35 ameliorates cardiovascular disease by suppressing inflammatory responses and regulating immune homeostasis.
